name: Morning Eleventh Step Meditation Meeting
notes:
---

In the meeting room to the left...

Morning Eleventh Step Meditation Meeting

Every Mondayat McCormick Clubhouse at 7:30 AM. In the meeting room to the left.

This meeting focuses on the Eleventh Step. This meeting has its’ own opening prayer. Following the prayer This meeting practices 10 minutes of silent meditation.

This meeting then breaks into small groups for discussion in order that each individual has an opportunity to share.

This is an “Open Meeting.”

To start Monday, October 23 at 7:30 AM
at The McCormack Club house in Ames, IA
